max_memory_num.name: Max memory num
max_memory_num.hint: Maximum number of memories, triggers memory compression while hit this number

zh.name: 最大记忆数量
zh.hint: 记忆条数达到此数量时触发记忆压缩

compression_model.name: Compression Model
compression_model.hint: Model ID used to compress memories, use default fast LLM by default

zh.name: 压缩模型
zh.hint: 用于压缩记忆的模型 ID，默认使用快速 LLM
